title: Unapproved Verb or Alias in Function Name
description: Functions must use only approved PowerShell verbs. Detected use of non-standard verbs (e.g., 'Handle-', 'Broadcast-') or aliases in function names.
detection: Scan for function definitions using non-approved verbs or custom prefixes (e.g., 'Handle-', 'Broadcast-').
remediation: Rename functions to use approved PowerShell verbs. For example, use 'Get-', 'Set-', 'Invoke-', 'Start-', 'Stop-', 'Test-', etc.
